value.found_quote: Antigravity 2.0 introduces advanced multi-agent orchestration for extremely complex tasks... Using `/teamwork-preview` prompts the main agent to launch a collaborative multi-agent framework. This framework features built-in error recovery, automatic retries, and coordination logic, allowing you to simply define the high-level goal while the platform manages the overhead of a cooperative agent team.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes an advanced multi-agent orchestration framework with built-in error recovery, retries, and coordination logic — matching the core elements of the claim. The page also describes both synchronous-style (parent agent delegating and monitoring) and asynchronous subagent execution, consistent with the claim about orchestrating agents both synchronously and asynchronously. However, the feature (`/teamwork-preview`) is explicitly marked as currently in preview and exclusive to Ultra plan users, so lifecycle_status is 'preview'. The claim's phrase "central command center" loosely maps to the parent/main agent orchestration model described on the page.
